expectations.text: The strategy JSON block is present and contains keys: input, padded, tile, pad_impl, strategy_source, estimated_execution_us, estimated_total_us, confidence
expectations.evidence: strategy.json has all required top-level keys. Notes field is an array rather than a string but all required keys are present.

expectations.text: The proposed padded M, N, K are each members of the respective ALLOWED lists
expectations.evidence: Mp=512 in ALLOWED_M, Np=512 in ALLOWED_N, Kp=768 in ALLOWED_K

expectations.text: The padded dims are all >= the input dims (Mp >= 300, Np >= 500, Kp >= 700)
The tile (m, n, k) evenly divides the padded shape
Phase 4 writes or attempts to write to memory/gemm-data/runs.json
expectations.evidence: No Phase 4 executed — baseline has no skill workflow. No runs.json update.

expectations.text: A session log file is created or attempted in memory/sessions/
expectations.evidence: No session log created — baseline has no memory update phase.
